CustomField.formula: CASE( JU_RelationshipDegree__c , '初期レベル', IMAGE("https://forcecom175--c.visualforce.com/resource/1665746841000/RelationshipDegreeJU_Lv1?", "",38, 690) , '中期レベル', IMAGE("https://forcecom175--c.visualforce.com/resource/1665746859000/RelationshipDegreeJU_Lv2?", "",38, 690) , '後期レベル', IMAGE("https://forcecom175--c.visualforce.com/resource/1665746880000/RelationshipDegreeJU_Lv3?", "",38, 690) , '', IMAGE("https://forcecom175--c.visualforce.com/resource/1665746817000/RelationshipDegreeJU_Lv0?", "",38, 690) , '' )
CustomField.label: 関係構築度画像_JU
